category_sources: source_facts.description says it indexes high-dimensional data; official README says NGT performs high-speed approximate nearest neighbor searches over high-dimensional vector data.
display_name_sources: Official repository title and README use NGT; source_facts.name is ngt.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, commands, methods, utilities, and documentation links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/NGT-labs/NGT, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions indexing high-dimensional data; official README describes commands, a library, nearest-neighbor search, and graph/tree methods.
